simple_types.name: Unsigned_24
simple_types.code: type Unsigned_24 is mod 2**24 with Size => 24;

array_types.name: Byte_Array
array_types.code: type Byte_Array is array (Integer range <>) of Unsigned_8;

documentation.description:
Reverse bits in a byte.

E.g. Bit_Reverse (2#1101_0001#) = 2#1000_1011#

subprograms.name: Shift_Left
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Left
  (Value  : Unsigned_24;
   Amount : Natural)
   return Unsigned_24

subprograms.name: Shift_Right
subprograms.code:
function Shift_Right
  (Value  : Unsigned_24;
   Amount : Natural)
   return Unsigned_24
